overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a foggy, rain-soaked futuristic urban district with brutalist architecture. The player navigates elevated walkways, covered passages, and open plazas while approaching a street musician playing a handpan drum.

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway overlooking a multi-lane highway and massive brutalist building complex

entered.detail: elevated multi-lane highway with palm trees lining the median
massive concrete structure with layered horizontal platforms and industrial details
tall palm trees visible in the distance along the highway
illuminated red neon signage visible through the fog
metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated concrete walkway overlooking a fog-shrouded highway. The massive brutalist architecture of the surrounding buildings dominates the right side, while palm trees and neon signs are visible in the distance through the heavy rain and fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with concrete pillars

events.description: turns right and enters covered walkway from open balcony area

agents.ego_description: turning right into a covered walkway and passing an NPC leaning on the railing

notable_agents.action: NPC in dark jacket and red pants leaning on metal railing looking out at the plaza below

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the covered walkway providing shelter from rain
large structural concrete pillar supporting the overhead structure
teal-colored vending machine with illuminated display

segments.scene_description: The player turns right into a covered walkway, leaving the open highway view behind. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed with artificial lighting, concrete pillars, and a vending machine visible. An NPC stands leaning on the railing to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway adjacent to yellow commercial building

agents.ego_description: walking along covered walkway with yellow building facade on the left and metal railing on the right

entered.detail: two-story commercial building with distinctive yellow facade and signage
flight of concrete stairs leading up to higher level
green illuminated medical cross sign visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player proceeds along a covered walkway with a distinctive yellow commercial building on the left. The walkway features metal railings on the right side overlooking lower levels, with concrete stairs and neon medical signage visible ahead in the foggy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with stairs and vendor stalls

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza area with full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza area passing by stairs and vendor structures

entered.detail: blue canopy covering a street vendor stall
metal chain link fence with barbed wire on top

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide plaza exposed to the foggy sky. The player passes by concrete stairs and vendor stalls while navigating the wet concrete surface. The yellow building falls behind as chain-link fences and new structures come into view.

events.description: begins descending concrete stairs past vendor stalls

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs past a vendor stall with a yellow illuminated sign

notable_agents.action: vendor sitting at stall under blue canopy with yellow illuminated sign

entered.detail: vendor stall with bright yellow illuminated signage and various goods
pink neon sign reading 'TIPS' mounted on wall
tall concrete walls enclosing the stairway

segments.scene_description: The player descends a flight of concrete stairs flanked by concrete walls, passing a vendor stall with a bright yellow sign on the left. A pink neon 'TIPS' sign glows on the right wall as the environment becomes more enclosed and darker.

events.description: slows down and stops to observe street musician playing handpan drum

agents.ego_description: approaching and stopping to watch a street musician sitting on the ground playing a handpan drum

notable_agents.action: street musician with blonde hair sitting cross-legged playing a handpan drum with tip box nearby

entered.detail: wide open concrete plaza with scattered debris and puddles
wide concrete steps leading up to building entrance

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a wide open plaza and approaches a street musician sitting on the ground playing a handpan drum. The camera slows and stops to observe the performer, who has a tip box placed in front of them on the wet concrete.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an elevated, fog-shrouded highway overlook into the heart of a rain-soaked urban plaza. It begins on a concrete walkway dominated by massive brutalist architecture and distant neon signs before turning right into a dark, enclosed passage lined with concrete pillars and artificial lighting. As the camera proceeds, the scene shifts past a distinctive yellow commercial building and metal railings, eventually exiting the cover to open into a wide, wet plaza under a heavy gray sky. The movement then leads down a flight of concrete stairs flanked by a glowing pink tips sign and vendor stalls, narrowing the field of view before finally emerging into a broad open space. The camera slows to a halt as it approaches a street musician playing a handpan drum on the damp concrete.
